created_for: Adarsh Tiwari practice arena with 100k+ question bank

scope.primary_exam: NEET UG / AIPMT trend model, approx last 20 years with heavier weight to 2021-2025
scope.secondary_reference: JEE Main Physics and Chemistry style only; not used for Biology and not used to raise NEET beyond syllabus
scope.not_a_guarantee: This is a trend/selector blueprint, not official future prediction. Exact 20-year counts require a tagged PYQ corpus.

JEE_Main_Paper_1_reference.per_subject_reference: Physics/Chemistry use MCQ + numerical style awareness; do not copy difficulty blindly

calibration_instruction.current_status: expert-estimated trend model with public recent-year signals
upgrade_path: tag every PYQ from 2005-2026 with subject, chapter, topic, form, difficulty, NCERT anchor
replace target_avg values with actual weighted moving averages
keep min_safe/max_safe ranges to preserve paper diversity
run annual recalibration after each NEET paper

recommended_weighting_formula.reason: NTA-style shifts and syllabus changes make recent papers more predictive than very old AIPMT papers

mandatory_constraints: must cover electrodynamics + modern physics + mechanics + thermal/optics in every full test
limit one chapter to max 4 questions except combined modern/electrodynamics cluster
organic must include GOC + product/reagent + named reaction mix
Molecular Basis + Genetics should be locked high-yield
include plant diversity/kingdom + cell/cell cycle + ecology in most tests
avoid making all Biology direct one-line MCQ
Animal Kingdom + Human Physiology + Human Reproduction + Health/Disease/Biotech must be represented
include diagrams from human physiology/reproduction/neural/excretion regularly

tricky_generation_rules: combine error propagation with graph slope/intercept occasionally

neet_full_balanced_180.description: Balanced full NEET-style paper: 45 Physics, 45 Chemistry, 45 Botany, 45 Zoology.
neet_full_balanced_180.rotation_note: Do not use exact same counts every test. Use count as target center and rotate within min_safe/max_safe.

neet_score_booster_high_yield.description: Slightly high-yield biased paper for practice blocks; still must not ignore low/moderate chapters.
rules: increase high/very_high chapters by +1 within section cap
cap any single chapter at 6 in Botany/Zoology, 4 in Physics/Chemistry except molecular genetics

neet_diversity_wide_coverage.description: Wider coverage paper for preventing chapter overfitting.
rules: force at least 16 Physics chapters, 17 Chemistry chapters, 16 Botany chapters, 15 Zoology chapters to appear
reduce locked high-yield by 1 only if enough good questions exist
use more easy/medium NCERT-line questions but maintain 20% statement/match/diagram mix

recent_NEET_item_style_shift.summary: Recent papers show more statement, matching, graph/diagram and multi-statement items; full tests should not be only direct one-line MCQs.

selector_translation.Physics: graph/diagram/experiment items should appear regularly; numerical dominance remains
selector_translation.Chemistry: statement + matching + NCERT fact checks should be mixed with numericals/reactions
selector_translation.Biology: statement, match-the-following, assertion-reason and NCERT diagram/table/example items should be heavily represented

hard_filters: pyq_similarity_score <= 0.82 unless explicitly marked as PYQ practice
do not select same duplicate_cluster_id twice in one test
do not select out_of_current_syllabus questions unless test_mode allows legacy
selection_algorithm: choose paper template using deterministic seed
calculate section quotas from trend JSON
fill locked high-yield quotas first, then medium chapters, then low/legacy only if allowed
inside each chapter, enforce topic_focus diversity before selecting second question from same subtopic
apply difficulty and question_form quotas at section level
run audit; if distribution violates critical constraints, reroll with same seed + salt
save test_seed, blueprint_version, selected_question_ids, distribution_audit, and warnings
active_test_security_display: hide chapter, topic, difficulty, source, and trend tags during active test
after submission show full analytics by subject/chapter/topic/difficulty/question_form
fail_conditions: insufficient approved questions for a locked high-yield quota
too many duplicate clusters available for a chapter
chapter quota cannot be satisfied without breaking current syllabus filter

jee_main_reference.purpose: JEE Main is used only as a secondary style reference for Physics/Chemistry because JEE has stronger numerical/CBT variation; NEET depth must remain NCERT/NEET-level.

source_references.name: NTA NEET official site
source_references.used_for: official exam authority and NEET UG public information

source_references.name: NEET UG 2026 Information Bulletin / Syllabus notices
source_references.used_for: exam pattern and current-syllabus alignment; exact syllabus should be synced from latest official notice

source_references.name: NTA JEE Main official site and 2026 information bulletin/syllabus pages
source_references.used_for: secondary JEE Main Physics/Chemistry style reference

source_references.name: Target Publications NEET UG 2025 paper analysis
source_references.used_for: recent subject difficulty and high-weight topic signals

source_references.name: CareerOrbits NEET chapterwise trend summary
source_references.used_for: broad past-paper trend heuristics and class split signal

source_references.name: Recent NEET MCQ type analysis 2021-2024 public PDF mirror
source_references.used_for: recent item-form shift signal; lower-trust source, included only for item-type heuristic
